publishedAbstract: - After `RHODF` installation, `StorageCluster` CR is not configuring due to below error, ~~~ constraints not satisfiable: bundle odf-dependencies.v4.20.2-rhodf requires an operator with package: odf-external-snapshotter-operator and with version in range: 4.20.2-rhodf, subscription odf-dependencies exists, subscription odf-dependencies requires cs-redhat-operator-index-v4-20/openshift-marketplace/stable-4.20/odf-dependencies.v4.20.2-rhodf ~~~
publishedTitle: StorageCluster CR is not creating after installing RHODF v4.20 in disconnected environment
